articles.title: AI predicts and Medicare pays; a new model could change everyday healthcare
articles.description: Medicare has introduced a new payment model that could make it easier for AI tools to become part of everyday healthcare. By paying for care delivered beyond clinic visits, the shift supports technologies that manage follow-ups, monitoring, and coordination. The change may help AI move from pilot projects into routine patient care.

articles.title: Intel-AMD veterans' Agrani Labs scouts for $100 million to build AI chip
articles.description: Agrani Labs, founded by former Intel and AMD executives, is aiming for a significant $100 million Series A funding. This investment will support the development of AI inference chips designed to work with Nvidia's CUDA software. The company is in talks with Qualcomm and Battery Ventures for potential investment.

articles.title: Moto G37 Power with a 7,000mAh battery is coming to India along with G37
articles.description: The Moto G37 and Moto G37 Power were unveiled in global markets last month, and the two smartphones are now headed to India. While the Indian variants retain most of the spec of their global counterparts, they are powered by the Dimensity 9400 chipset. Motorola India has confirmed that the Moto G37 and G37 Power will launch in the country on May 19. Both smartphones will be available through Flipkart, Motorola’s official online store, and select offline retail outlets. The Moto G37 will feature a 6.7-inch display with a 120Hz refresh rate, a dual rear camera setup led by a 50MP...

articles.title: Google may cut free storage to 5GB but there is a way users can get full 15GB
articles.description: Google appears to be testing a new policy that reduces free cloud storage for new accounts to 5GB. Users can unlock the full 15GB by linking a phone number, a move Google states is to ensure one pool per person and prevent bots. Existing accounts are unlikely to be affected by this change.

articles.title: Anthropic to donate $200 million to Bill Gates' Gates Foundation
articles.description: Anthropic and the Gates Foundation are committing $200 million over four years to advance AI for public good, focusing on global health, life sciences, education, and economic mobility. This partnership aims to accelerate vaccine development, improve health data utilization, and enhance educational tools for K-12 students and adult learners worldwide.

articles.description: Major electric scooter companies are rapidly increasing production capacity. This expansion aims to meet a surge in demand for eco-friendly vehicles. Companies are navigating challenges while betting on strong future growth.

articles.description: The vivo S50 series was announced back in December, and we are now getting our first set of info for its successors. The upcoming S60 series is now being teased in China, where vivo Product Manager Han Boxiao shared images of the vanilla S60 model. The images show the side and back profile of the device, and it seems like it will have an aluminum frame and a triple camera setup. The model shown in the teaser features a gradient design with sparkling elements. articles.title: Big Tech’s AI Layoffs May Be Backfiring
articles.description: AI is transforming corporate operations, with over 108,724 tech layoffs in 2026 linked to increased AI investments. However, a Gartner study reveals that companies reducing workforce for AI have not improved financially.
